title: ficus rolandri
intro: Ficus rolandri, also known as the Ficus benghalensis var. rolandri, is a species of tree belonging to the fig family (Moraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are extracted from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Ficus rolandri include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments that can be used to treat various health conditions.
